zh.Fauntleroy's Marsh Manor, Sherborne, Dor: 英國英格蘭多瑟特黑爾波內
zh.Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭多瑟特馬希
zh.Fauntleroy's Marsh Manor, Alveston, Warw: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿爾維斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh於1370年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特黑爾波內時，他的父親John Fauntleroy31歲，母親Alice Fauntleroy21歲。他於1398年之前與Joan LeWalleys在英國多瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1440年5月20日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾阿爾維斯頓享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特。

zh-hans.Marsh, Dorset, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰多瑟特馬希

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh于1370年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特黑爾波內时，他的父亲John Fauntleroy31岁，母亲Alice Fauntleroy21岁。他于1398年之前与Joan LeWalleys在英国多瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1440年5月20日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿爾維斯頓享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特。

nameMeanings.name: Fauntleroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French phrase enfant le roi ‘son of the king’, denoting a royal prince and, as a surname, a member of a royal prince's household.

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Marsh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by or in a marsh or fen, Middle English mersch (Old English mersc), or a habitational name from any of various minor places called with this word, for example in Yorkshire, Shropshire and Buckinghamshire.
Americanized form of Slovenian Marš: unexplained. Compare Mars 7.

variants.name: Marsch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin.
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a marsh or fen, Middle Low German marsch.

variants.name: Mash
meanings: English: variant of Marsh with loss of -r-.
Americanized form of German   Masch  , in part of Sorbian origin.

variants.name: Masch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Fritz, Erwin, Horst, Ralf.  Jewish Ber, Sima.
North German: topographic name from Middle Low German masch ‘marsh, fen’, a variant of marsch. Compare English Marsh .
German (Alemannic; Mäsch): nickname from Middle High German mast ‘fat, stout’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh was born in 1370, in Sherborne, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fauntleroy, was 31 and his mother, Alice Fauntleroy, was 21. He married Joan LeWalleys before 1398, in Dorset, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 May 1440, in Alveston, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70, and was buried in Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh est né en 1370, à Sherborne, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fauntleroy, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice Fauntleroy, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Joan LeWalleys avant 1398, à Dorset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 mai 1440, à Alveston, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh 1370 in Sherborne, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fauntleroy 31 und seine Mutter Alice Fauntleroy 21. Er hat vor 1398 in Dorset, England Joan LeWalleys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. Mai 1440 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Alveston, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh è nato il nel 1370 nel Sherborne, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fauntleroy, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice Fauntleroy, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Joan LeWalleys prima del 1398, nel Dorset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 maggio 1440, nel Alveston, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marshが1370年にイギリスイギリスドールセトシェルボルンで生まれた時，父John Fauntleroyは31歳，母Alice Fauntleroyは21歳であった。1398年以前にイギリスドールセトでJoan LeWalleysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1440年5月20日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアアルベストンで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh(이)가 1370년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 셔본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fauntleroy(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Fauntleroy(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1398년 이전 영국 도르세트에서 Joan LeWalleys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1440년 5월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 앨베스턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh nasceu em 1370, em Sherborne, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fauntleroy, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice Fauntleroy, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan LeWalleys antes 1398, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de maio de 1440, em Alveston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh родился в 1370 г. в местности ширборн, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fauntleroy было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice Fauntleroy, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan LeWalleys перед 1398 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 мая 1440 г. в местности алвестон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Fauntleroy of Faunatlerey's Marsh nació en 1370, en Sherborne, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Fauntleroy, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice Fauntleroy, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Joan LeWalleys antes de 1398, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de mayo de 1440, en Alveston, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
